headline: Realty Income Apollo Venture Reshapes Funding Mix And Growth Path
summary: Realty Income (NYSE:O) has formed a $1 billion private capital joint venture with Apollo focused on stabilized, single-tenant retail properties. The venture includes long-term management rights for Realty Income and call options on the portfolio, aligning interests over an extended period. The structure is intended to diversify Realty Income's capital sources beyond public markets and support future investment activity. Realty Income, trading at $62.64, is moving ahead with this private...
